title: Dubai Miracle Garden offers free entry for UAE residents from March 15 to 31; Dates, and best timings to visit
summary_full: UAE residents can enjoy free entry to the Dubai Miracle Garden from March 15 to March 31. This initiative aims to provide a relaxing escape amidst regional tensions and ahead of Eid festivities. Visitors can walk in without reservations, with the garden open daily from 9 am to 9 pm.
